results.generated_text_full: Question: File Save Error in J up y ter not ebook says disk I / O error, but df - h shows free space. Why? Tags: j up y ter linux Answer: I had the same problem. I found that this is due to memory leaks. If you are using a shared memory (or shared) and not a shared object (the shared object is only in memory), then you can 't use the shared object. You cannot use shared objects in your application.
